events.title: Five Temples of Her — Live Ritual Performance
events.description: A ninety-minute live ritual performance from Mariama Del Mar — spiritual dancer and world-music vocalist — staged at ASH inside Nuanu Creative City, just south of Ubud. The piece moves through myth, tradition, and inner transformation as a continuous arc, weaving tribal-fusion and contemporary movement, Japanese fan dance, and devotional vocal work (including traditional Turkish songs) over a live ensemble: didgeridoo, duduk, flutes, cello, piano, jaw harp, frame drums. Musicians include Kuropros (cello), Tatiana Gordeeva (piano), and multi-instrumentalists Stepan Suvorov and Alex Ostapenko. Closer in form to ceremony-as-concert than to a participatory dance evening — sit, watch, listen, drop in. One night only.
events.short_description: Mariama Del Mar's ninety-minute live ritual performance at ASH, Nuanu — tribal-fusion + contemporary movement + devotional vocals over a live ethno ensemble. May 27.

events.title: Shamanic Breathwork with Jane
events.description: A two-hour shamanic breathwork journey at The Yoga Barn, run every Wednesday afternoon — conscious-connected breathing paired with bodywork and a music journey designed to move energy, surface patterns, and open access to states that ordinary waking consciousness can't reach. Breath becomes the entry point; the room and the music do the rest. Held by Jane; format is participatory, not performative — lie down on the mat, breathe, let it work. 350,000 IDR drop-in. Wednesdays 14:30–16:30.
events.short_description: Weekly Wednesday two-hour shamanic breathwork journey at The Yoga Barn — conscious-connected breath + music journey + bodywork. 14:30, 350k IDR.

events.title: Shakti Bhakti Kirtan with Anu Karoliina
events.description: A weekly Wednesday acoustic kirtan held at Intuitive Flow in Penestanan — community chanting to the Divine, mantra by candlelight, voices rising over a small acoustic ensemble. Led by Anu Karoliina and friends as a recurring open gathering: bring your voice, sit in the circle, let the call-and-response do the work. The studio is small and intentional; the format is devotional rather than performative. Doors at 6:30 PM, walk-in friendly. Contribution 200,000 IDR.
events.short_description: Weekly Wednesday acoustic kirtan with Anu Karoliina in Penestanan — community chanting to the Divine. 6:30 PM, 200k IDR.
events.venue_address: Jl. Raya Penestanan, Penestanan, Ubud, Bali
